title: Steer vs Queue vs Interrupt
brief: 技术信息图,横向三栏对比 agent 运行中三种用户干预原语。第一栏 STEER 转方向盘:方向盘图标;含义 修改当前任务方向;生效 尽快在下一个工具或模型边界注入当前 turn;适合 纠偏、补充约束。第二栏 QUEUE 下个路口:路口红绿灯图标;含义 安排下一个任务;生效 当前任务结束后;适合 后续独立需求。第三栏 INTERRUPT 急刹车:刹车图标;含义 终止当前任务;生效 立即;适合 方向完全错误需重来。每栏一个清晰图标加三行短标签(含义/生效/适合)。冷静专业科技配色,清晰信息层级,中英文标签简洁。
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'Steer vs Queue vs Interrupt'. Diagram type: article illustration. Use a flat technical infographic illustration, clean grouped modules, clear arrows, soft professional palette, concise bilingual labels, document-friendly composition. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
